tagline: Tampa Bay's Trusted Custom Pool Builder

hero.headline:
Your Dream Pool, Built by the Owner
Who Cares
hero.subheadline: For 18 years, owner Eric Larsen has personally guided every project from first sketch to final splash. No salespeople, no handoffs — just Tampa Bay's most awarded pool builder treating your backyard like his own.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Custom Pool Solutions From<br class="hidden md:block"> Concept to Completion
services.subtitle: From award-winning custom pools to complete outdoor living spaces, Larsen's delivers craftsmanship backed by 18 years of Tampa Bay experience and direct owner involvement on every project.

cards.title: Custom Pool Construction
cards.description: Shotcrete pools designed around your vision — custom shapes, sun shelves, tanning ledges, and integrated features. Owner Eric Larsen is on-site and involved throughout your entire build.

cards.title: Pool Renovation & Remodeling
cards.description: Breathe new life into your existing pool with PebbleTec finishes, new coping, retiling, modern equipment upgrades, and complete resurfacing — built to the same standard as our new pools.

cards.title: Spa & Hot Tub Construction
cards.description: Integrated custom spas with therapeutic jets, LED lighting, and spillover effects designed seamlessly alongside your pool for the ultimate backyard retreat.

cards.title: Water & Fire Features
cards.description: Waterfalls, sheer descents, bubblers, fire bowls, and fire walls that transform your pool area into a resort-caliber outdoor experience with drama and ambiance.

cards.title: 3D Pool Design
cards.description: See your custom pool come to life before construction begins with advanced 3D visualization. Refine every detail with our design team until it's exactly right.

cards.title: Outdoor Living Spaces
cards.description: Complete backyard transformations — outdoor kitchens, lanais, screen enclosures, paver decking, and landscaping that create cohesive living spaces centered around your pool.

how_it_works.headline: From Your Vision to Your Backyard in Three Steps

steps.title: Meet Eric for a Free Consultation
steps.description: Schedule a no-pressure design consultation directly with owner Eric Larsen. He'll visit your property, listen to your vision, and discuss possibilities — no salespeople, no middlemen.

steps.title: Approve Your Custom 3D Design
steps.description: Our team creates a detailed 3D rendering of your pool. Refine every detail until you love it. You'll know exact costs upfront with our transparent six-stage draw payment schedule.

steps.title: Watch Your Dream Pool Come to Life
steps.description: Eric stays personally involved throughout construction with clear communication at every stage. Most clients are amazed at how smooth the process is — and many finish ahead of schedule.

about.label: Why Tampa Bay Trusts Larsen's
about.headline: Not a Corporation — A Craftsman Who Answers His Own Phone
about.description: Eric Larsen started in the pool industry as a teenager, learning every aspect of service, repair, remodeling, and construction before founding Larsen's Pool and Spa in 2008. Built on the Golden Rule — treating every client the way he'd want to be treated — the company has grown through economic downturns and earned an A+ BBB rating with zero complaints. Eric remains directly involved and personally accessible on every single project.

features.title: Owner on Every Project
features.description: Eric Larsen personally oversees your pool from initial consultation through completion. You'll always have his direct phone number.

features.title: Transparent Pricing & Contracts
features.description: Our six-stage draw payment schedule means you know exactly what you're paying and when. Clear contracts, no hidden fees, no surprises.

features.title: Award-Winning Quality Guaranteed
features.description: Angi Super Service Award winner every year since 2010, Best of Houzz, FSPA Design Award 2025, and Best of Florida 2025. Our track record speaks for itself.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Six-Stage Payment Schedule.
pricing.subtitle: Every project comes with a clear contract and our proven six-stage draw payment schedule. You know exactly what you're paying and when — no surprises, no hidden fees.

guarantee.headline: Our "Golden Rule" Guarantee
guarantee.description: We treat your project like we'd want our own pool built. If anything isn't right, Eric Larsen personally makes it right — backed by a strong warranty package, direct manufacturer support from Hayward and PebbleTec, and 18 years of standing behind our work. Zero BBB complaints since 2008.

faqs.question: How long does a custom pool build take?
faqs.answer: Most custom pool projects are completed in 8-12 weeks depending on complexity and permitting. Many of our clients have been pleasantly surprised to finish ahead of schedule. Eric will give you a realistic timeline during your consultation.

faqs.question: Will I actually work with the owner?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Eric Larsen is personally involved in every project from the first consultation through final walkthrough. You'll have his direct phone number and he's accessible throughout the entire process. No salespeople, no project managers acting as middlemen.

faqs.question: How does your payment schedule work?
faqs.answer: We use a transparent six-stage draw payment schedule tied to construction milestones. You only pay as work is completed, and everything is spelled out clearly in your contract before we break ground. No large upfront deposits.

faqs.question: Do you handle permits and HOA approvals?
faqs.answer: Yes, we manage all permitting across Pinellas, Hillsborough, Pasco, and surrounding counties. We're also experienced with HOA requirements and will handle that coordination so you don't have to.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the Greater Tampa Bay Area including Pinellas, Hillsborough, and Pasco counties, as well as Northern Manatee and Southern Hernando counties. If you're in the Tampa Bay region, we can likely build your pool.

testimonials.name: Julie D.
testimonials.text: I tell my friends and family that I hired the creme de la creme of pool companies, and it shows. I have a top of the line pool! Bonus — the project was completed ahead of schedule.

testimonials.name: Joe R.
testimonials.text: This is the 4th pool we've put into our homes and by far the best experience we've ever had. Everyone at Larsen's was knowledgeable, friendly, and outstanding communicators.

testimonials.name: Scott T.
testimonials.text: From the initial meeting with Eric and the team I could easily see why this company is head and shoulders better than the rest. I couldn't be happier with my pool and my experience!
